name: frankenbeast
description: Deterministic guardrails framework for AI agents

scripts.build: for d in franken-types franken-brain franken-critique franken-governor franken-heartbeat franken-observer franken-planner franken-skills frankenfirewall franken-orchestrator; do echo "Building $d..." && cd $d && npm run build && cd ..; done
scripts.test:all: for d in franken-types franken-brain franken-critique franken-governor franken-heartbeat franken-observer franken-planner franken-skills frankenfirewall franken-orchestrator; do echo "Testing $d..." && cd $d && npm test && cd ..; done && vitest run
